module.name: badge
module.description: A small filled pill/label whose text is the block body (spaces / commas / inline Markdown allowed). Renders inline within surrounding text.
module.aiSpec:
A small pill/label for tags, statuses, versions or short emphasis (e.g. "New", "v2.0", "Beta"). The block body is the badge label and may contain spaces, commas and inline markdown. Gotcha: it is declared as a block module but renders INLINE, so it flows within the surrounding text rather than sitting on its own line. For a clickable call-to-action use @button instead; for a titled block use @card.
Parameters: - color (color, default var(--accent-color)): the pill color (fill for solid, text/border for outline & soft). - variant (select: solid | outline | soft, default solid): solid = filled pill with light text; outline = transparent with a colored border and colored text; soft = a lightly tinted fill with colored text. - textcolor (color, default #ffffff): label color for the solid variant only (ignored by outline/soft, which use `color`). - size (select: sm | md | lg, default md): pill/text size.
Usage: <!-- @badge color: #10b981, variant: soft, size: sm --> Beta <!-- @end -->

param.name: color
param.label: Color
param.desc: Pill color (fill for solid; border/text for outline and soft).

param.name: variant
param.label: Variant
param.desc: Solid fill, outlined, or a light tinted fill.

param.name: textcolor
param.label: Text color
param.desc: Label color for the solid variant only.

snippet.label: Badge
snippet.description: A filled badge. Body = the badge text.

snippet.label: Badge (soft tint)
snippet.text: <!-- @badge color: #10b981, variant: soft, size: sm --> Beta <!-- @end -->
snippet.description: A lightly tinted small badge for statuses/tags.
